# Subscribers.Completion

**Enumeration**

A signal that a publisher doesn’t produce additional elements, either due to normal completion or an error.

## Declaration

```swift
@frozen enum Completion<Failure> where Failure : Error
```

## Completion states

- **Subscribers.Completion.finished**: The publisher finished normally.
- **Subscribers.Completion.failure(_:)**: The publisher stopped publishing due to the indicated error.

## Receiving life cycle events

- **receive(subscription:)**: Tells the subscriber that it has successfully subscribed to the publisher and may request items.
- **receive(completion:)**: Tells the subscriber that the publisher has completed publishing, either normally or with an error.

## Conforms To

- Copyable
- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
